title: Re arranging the S2 Works
wikitext:
[]: Re-arranging the S2 Works             Quote Post by thedarkorb » Sat Nov 13, 2010 8:51 pm So I have been working on a new project to re-arrange the S2 works into a more listenable listening experience. Trying to sit through the discs as is is pretty much damn near impossible. Has anyone else here made their own playlist? There is a lot to sift through...

[]:             Quote Post by Dark09 » Sun Nov 14, 2010 12:43 am I don't have a specific playlist. I usually select random between all 7 disks lol. Air is my all time fav though lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Nov 14, 2010 2:46 am Reichu came up with a relatively listenable mix way back in the day (this was before such terms as "playlist" had even entered the public mind, you understand), which can be found here. Scroll down a ways, it's at the bottom. Unfortunately I believe that list is composed solely of tracks that are actually used in the show - or at any rate, Asuka's Death isn't on there, which is a damn shame because it's not only my favorite piece of cut music from Eva but quite possibly my favorite piece of Eva music entirely.

[]:             Quote Post by thedarkorb » Sun Nov 14, 2010 2:39 pm Yeah, I've read through that, though it cuts off at Disc 4. Reichu???
